messages.content:
Describe how an authenticated attacker could exploit this vulnerability.

An OS command injection vulnerability in FortiDeceptor 3.1.0, 3.0.1, 3.0.0 may allow a remote authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the system by exploiting a command injection vulnerability on the Customization page.
An authenticated attacker can exploit this vulnerability by manipulating inputs on the Customization page to inject specially crafted commands that the operating system will execute.
